message:
fix: resolve gosec G104 unhandled rows.Close() errors in dependencies.go

Add explicit error suppression (_ = rows.Close()) for 6 instances across
GetDependenciesWithMetadata and GetDependentsWithMetadata where rows.Close()
errors were unhandled. These are cleanup calls in error-return paths where
the primary error is already being returned.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
